creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
> kde-baseapps-23.04.3_2.pkg

% pkg query %o kde-baseapps
x11/kde-baseapps
% 

<https://www.freshports.org/x11/kde-baseapps/#packages> for FreeBSD:14:i386 shows 

* 23.08.0_2 in latest

* the fallout symbol for quarterly. 

Related, for quarterly FreeBSD:14:i386 for this port at this time: 

<https://github.com/FreshPorts/freshports/issues/460>

> Tables of packages: for 'repo not found' or 'never imported', 
> do not display the fallout icon · Issue #460 · FreshPorts/freshports

More generally, for readers who may be unaware, <https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/>: 

* i386 is Tier 2.
